not_promoted: Template only; actual Gemini CLI extension host smoke evidence has not been produced.
Convert this template to a channel-smoke-plan with concrete host commands before running the smoke runner.

clean_environment.purpose: Prove the smoke runs from a clean Gemini CLI profile with no prior Eve extension state.
command_template: operator-run
Create a clean Gemini CLI profile and confirm Eve is not already configured.

entry_url.purpose: Prove Gemini CLI extension setup carries install_source=gemini-cli-extension.
command_template: operator-run
Open the Gemini CLI extension install path and confirm install_source=gemini-cli-extension attribution is present.

install_or_import.purpose: Install the Eve Gemini CLI extension from the release source or clean local package path.
command_template: operator-run
Run gemini extensions install for the Eve extension and confirm eve-memory extension is installed.

connect.purpose: Connect Gemini CLI to the hosted Eve MCP endpoint through the extension.
command_template: operator-run
Complete Gemini CLI MCP auth/connect and verify Eve MCP connectivity.

store.purpose: Store a synthetic Pack 12 smoke memory from Gemini CLI.
command_template: operator-run
Use Gemini CLI's connected Eve MCP tool to store ${EVE_PACK12_SMOKE_ID}.

read.purpose: Read back the synthetic smoke memory from Gemini CLI.
command_template: operator-run
Use Gemini CLI's Eve MCP read/search tool to retrieve ${EVE_PACK12_SMOKE_ID}.

forget.purpose: Forget the synthetic smoke memory and prove cleanup.
command_template: operator-run
Use Gemini CLI's Eve MCP forget/delete path to remove ${EVE_PACK12_SMOKE_ID}.

install_source_flow.purpose: Prove gemini-cli-extension attribution reaches product analytics.
command_template: operator-run
Inspect local/server evidence and confirm install_source=gemini-cli-extension is preserved.
operator-run
Trigger connector.install.completed for gemini-cli-extension and verify audit/metric evidence.

rollback_or_uninstall.purpose: Remove the Eve extension from the clean Gemini CLI profile.
command_template: operator-run
Run gemini extensions uninstall or documented rollback and verify Eve extension config is absent.
